name: Crunch-Filled Medjools
description: Medjool dates filled with crunch and coated in milk, dark, or white chocolate.

name: Dubai-Style Medjools
description: Medjool dates filled with pistachio paste and shredded filo dough (kataifi), coated in milk, dark, or white chocolate.

name: Date & Nut Balls
description: Naturally sweet bites made from premium dates blended with roasted nuts. No refined sugar or additives.

name: Homemade Nougat
description: Soft chewy nougat with cranberries, citrus zest, hazelnuts, almonds, and pistachios.

name: Twix Cups
description: Buttery biscuit with rich caramel and milk chocolate. Available with hazelnut-chocolate or pistachio fillings.

name: Cranberry Bliss Bars
description: Chewy cranberry bars topped with rich cream cheese frosting.

name: Orange Loaf Cake
description: Moist citrus loaf cake with a light crisp crust. Lemon and grapefruit versions available.

name: Chocolate Chip Cookies
description: Golden baked cookies with rich chocolate chips. Crisp edges with a soft chewy center.
